name: nutshell
description: Reads and writes documented Nutshell CRM REST resources through the Nutshell REST API.

risk.read: external Nutshell CRM read of account/contact/lead/activity/user and related CRM data
risk.write: external Nutshell CRM mutations including creates, updates, undeletes, watches, and destructive deletes
risk.approval: required for write actions; destructive delete actions carry destructive confirmation metadata
